records.ety: [F. scarifier, L. scarificare, scarifare, fr. Gr. <?/ to scratch up, fr. <?/ a pointed instrument.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Scarified (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Scarifying (?).]

defs: To scratch or cut the skin of; esp. (Med.), to make small incisions in, by means of a lancet or scarificator, so as to draw blood from the smaller vessels without opening a large vein.
To stir the surface soil of, as a field.
